name: Severed Metadata Recovery — Final Holdouts
description: The 17 of 868 severed Zenodo DOIs that remain without recovered metadata after querying both OpenAlex and the Zenodo 2026-06-07 bulk export (partial pass). Each holdout retains its title, date, sovereign ID, and AXN identifier in the alexanarch archive — only the DataCite registration metadata is still missing.
